title: analytics — self-emitted analytics events
description: Meta-analytics: events emitted by the analytics module itself. These are lifecycle events (provider configured, circuit breaker opened, identity merged) that admins care about — they surface in the tenant's own analytics dashboards under the `analytics_module_lifecycle` bucket. Distinct from events.json (Laravel event bus) + metrics.json (OpenTelemetry ops signal).
note: sink='self' — these events dispatch through the AnalyticsProviderManager just like everything else. Admin-facing dashboards read them via the tenant HTTP surface.

events.name: Analytics Provider Configured
events.description: AnalyticsProviderConfigured mirror — lets analytics dashboards visualise provider CRUD activity.

events.name: Analytics Circuit Breaker Opened
events.description: Ops signal AND admin dashboard signal — shown on the AnalyticsProviderList screen as a persistent chip while the breaker is open.

events.name: Analytics Identity Identified
events.description: Server-side identify — written to the identified subject's PROVIDER stream so downstream analytics tools see the alias too.

events.name: Analytics Funnel Step Reached
events.description: Emitted per AnalyticsFunnelStepReached — semantic mirror for provider-side funnel reports.

events.name: Analytics Experiment Variant Assigned
events.description: Emitted per AnalyticsExperimentAssigned. Powers the ExperimentAssignmentReportBuilder.
